title: Add non-blocking 'update available' Snackbar to Layout.tsx
description: Layout consumes useAutoUpdater() and shows a non-blocking MUI Snackbar (or Chip) when status.kind is 'available' or 'downloaded'. Snackbar is dismissible and links to / focuses Configuracion. Spanish copy.
acceptance_criteria: Renders a MUI <Snackbar> when status.kind === 'available' (message: 'Hay una nueva versión disponible') or 'downloaded' (message: 'Actualización lista para instalar')
Snackbar is non-blocking (does not modal-block the UI), dismissible, and includes an action button that navigates to/highlights Configuracion
Does not appear for kinds: idle, checking, not-available, downloading, error
Existing top-bar / menu container layout is unchanged in structure
tsc clean; no console errors in dev
completion_summary: Layout.tsx consumes useAutoUpdater; non-blocking MUI Snackbar (info/success) for available/downloaded with action button navigating to /configuracion.
